method: dual-agent impeccable critique (A: design review · B: detector + browser)
ai_slop_verdict: PASS — not AI slop. Hard offset shadows, no gradient text, editorial copy with locked brand voice, badge-tilt as system signature.

findings_at_critique.title: Checkout submit has no processing state
findings_at_critique.fix: Added submitting state + disabled button + 'Placing order…' label in PaymentForm; onSubmitting callback in checkout/page.tsx

findings_at_critique.title: text-ink-faint contrast ~2.9:1 fails WCAG AA
findings_at_critique.note: Logged in iteration backlog — one token change, zero regression risk, scoped to iteration stage

findings_at_critique.title: Focus not moved to payment decline alert
findings_at_critique.fix: Added declineRef + tabIndex={-1} + setTimeout focus in checkout/page.tsx

findings_at_critique.title: No skip-to-content link; heading level skip in cart
findings_at_critique.fix: Skip link added in layout.tsx; CartLineItem h3 → h2

findings_at_critique.title: Multiple simultaneous role=alert; no aria-invalid; no required
findings_at_critique.fix: PaymentForm: single aria-live summary region, aria-invalid + aria-describedby per input, required on all required fields, per-field role=alert removed

findings_at_critique.title: Remove button no item-specific aria-label
findings_at_critique.fix: aria-label='Remove {pack.name} from cart' added to CartLineItem remove button

p1_deferred_note: text-ink-faint contrast fix deferred to iteration stage (token only, no layout impact)
non_claims: does not prove WCAG AA compliance on all surfaces (text-ink-faint deferred)
does not prove screen-reader end-to-end testing with real AT
does not prove production deployment or real payment accessibility
does not prove mobile keyboard behavior on physical device
